_usage.description: SQL INSERT dispatch template. String values wrapped in {} are placeholders replaced at dispatch time.

available_placeholders.{name}: Device name passed to the dispatch function.
available_placeholders.{event_type}: Event type string passed to the dispatch function.
available_placeholders.{data}: Raw event_data value passed to the dispatch function. This can be any type, including bool, string, number, list, or dict.
available_placeholders.{data[key]}: Access a field only when event_data is dict-like (e.g. {data[epc]}, {data[rssi]}).

notes: Use {data[key]} only when event_data is a mapping/dict.
If event_data is a scalar value such as bool, string, int, or list, use {data} instead of nested field access.
The query must be executed with bound parameters; do not interpolate values directly into SQL strings.

filters._description: Only dispatch for a specific device.
Only dispatch for reads on antennas 1 or 2.
Only dispatch if RSSI is above threshold.

query: INSERT INTO events (device, epc, tid, ant, rssi, timestamp) VALUES (:device, :epc, :tid, :ant, :rssi, :timestamp)
